description: As a geotechnical engineer evaluating terrain for a proposed infrastructure corridor, analyze the SRTM digital elevation model (srtm_dem.tif) in SNAP Desktop to assess construction suitability. Produce a terrain analysis including terrain steepness and a classification layer for construction difficulty zones. Save the analysis in BEAM-DIMAP format and export the assessment as a GeoTIFF to /home/ga/snap_exports/.
